label: Clear English
text: My name is Alice Tan. I am a Singapore citizen and I am thirty-five years old. I lost my job and my household income is basically zero. I have two children.

label: Singlish
text: I'm Bobby, lah. Singaporean, thirty-five this year. Now sole breadwinner but on MC, no money already. I have two children.

label: Mandarin / Hokkien
text: 我叫陈美玲。我今年四十二岁，是新加坡公民。现在没有收入，还有两个孩子要照顾。
english: My name is Tan Mei Ling. I am forty-two years old and a Singapore citizen. I currently have no income and care for two children.

label: Noisy / ambiguous
text: My income is maybe [inaudible] and I cannot work right now.

label: Missing citizenship or age
text: I lost my job last month and I have three children. I need help with rent.

label: PII review
text: My NRIC is S1234567D and my phone number is 9123 4567. I have no income.

label: Urgent risk language
text: My partner is attacking me now and I am in immediate danger. I need help.
